response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience across multiple domains and languages, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database work, or any direct exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems — all mandatory requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with modern tooling and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse technologies across domains
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: No visible professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lack of any mention of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain expertise
SQL experience listed but no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage in financial systems
